question: This line chart shows average test scores in an Advanced Mathematics course across the semester (January to August). Based on the data, which statement best describes student performance over this period?

options.A: Average scores rise overall from January to August, despite some month-to-month variation.
options.B: Average scores steadily decline throughout the semester without any recovery.
options.C: Average scores fluctuate sharply with no overall increase or decrease across the semester.
options.D: Average scores stay almost the same from month to month, with only negligible changes.

explanation: The x‑axis labels are months but shown in a scrambled order, so the connected line path looks more erratic than the true pattern. If you reorder the months from January to August, the scores increase steadily from the starting value to the final month, indicating consistent improvement rather than volatility or decline.
